problem id: 3feeabea
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  10000001 -> 00010010
  11010000 -> 00000011
  10110011 -> 00110010
  11111011 -> 10110011
  01001111 -> 11110001
  00100101 -> 01010000
  01001000 -> 10000001
  10010000 -> 00000010
  01010010 -> 00100001

query: 10101001
predicted answer: 10010010
